examples: He derided the surrealists as' leaders of modernistic imbecility '.
You naive, foolish, irresponsible nincompoop... I quake at the imbecility of it.
And young men like billiards and CARDS, which take their minds off the imbecility of everyday work.
But in its current state of strategic imbecility, no European leader can acknowledge this basic fact.
Women judged the noises he made embarrassing, children found them a source of amusement, men a proof of imbecility.
